_comment: Examples sourced from Dragon's Dogma 1 dialogue (combined_output.csv)

dd1_examples.o'er: No way forward but ***o'er*** their corpses!
dd1_examples.main: This here is Gran Soren's main gate.
dd1_examples.dire: Arisen. Ser, I am in ***dire*** straits.
dd1_examples.does not: It ***does not*** seem human... 'Tis certainly no pawn.
dd1_examples.assay: I shall ***assay*** whether the chest is safe.
dd1_examples.forgive me: ***Forgive me***, good ser, for I spoke in haste and anger.
dd1_examples.smite: ***Smite*** the lot of them with lightning!
dd1_examples.did not: Best you ***did not*** keep him waiting.
dd1_examples.wish to: Oh? You ***wish to*** learn of the pawn legion?
dd1_examples.would not: The Maker ***would not*** be so cruel as to part you like this.
dd1_examples.ofttimes: This world is much like the ocean: Great forces push on it... Pull on it... ***Ofttimes*** the only hope is batten down and pray for daylight.
dd1_examples.should you not: None would hold you at fault ***should you not*** face the dragon.
dd1_examples.need not: 'Tis a relief to ***need not*** fear an ambush.
dd1_examples.have not: I ***have not*** the words to thank you.
dd1_examples.anon: I shall see you at the abbey ***anon***. Maker speed your steps.
dd1_examples.in short: Able hands are ***in short*** supply, cousin. We as can work must do what we can. Bring any flowers you find here.
dd1_examples.fie: ***Fie***! What to do, what to do...?
dd1_examples.was not: If it's true, I swear, it ***was not*** my intent! I had no idea...
dd1_examples.amidst: The order came to prevent brigands from flooding in ***amidst*** the chaos.
dd1_examples.would you not: So, well... You're buying something, yes? Else ***would you not*** be here, hmm?
dd1_examples.hail: ***Hail***, brave traveler! Welcome to our humble village.
dd1_examples.will you not: My earlier proposal yet stands. ***Will you not*** hear it?
dd1_examples.fare well: ***Fare well***, my friend, and may fortune smile upon your journey.
dd1_examples.fain: Still, I'm ***fain*** to stay a while yet.
dd1_examples.yon: In ***yon*** encampent they gather up their knights and hired steel...
dd1_examples.has not: War ***has not*** been kind to this place.
dd1_examples.perchance: ***Perchance*** one of these people knows aught of the Pawn Guild.
dd1_examples.forthwith: Mm, this may take some time. I shall begin ***forthwith***.
dd1_examples.lo: The Arisen nods, they say, and ***lo*** the spheres do shake!
dd1_examples.betwixt: Having stood ***betwixt*** you and the dragon, I am humbled.
dd1_examples.quell: The Arisen must possess the valor to stand against all threats, and the power to ***quell*** them.
dd1_examples.do you not: You travel the land as an Arisen, ***do you not***?
dd1_examples.wherein: Our spies learned of a plot ***wherein*** secrets of state were leaking to a gang of bandits.
dd1_examples.hence: Let them live now and we'll be plagued ***hence***. This ends here!
dd1_examples.had you not: ***Had you not*** been here, events would've taken a darker course, to be sure.
dd1_examples.henceforth: Every road in Gransys shall be open to you ***henceforth***,
dd1_examples.dare not: Let's to the southern gate. Our pursuers ***dare not*** follow into the city proper.
dd1_examples.scant: ***Scant*** few men remain to guard the castle, myself among them.
dd1_examples.cease: ***Cease*** this foolish bickering at once, lest I lose my patience with you both.
dd1_examples.goodly: 'Tis a ***goodly*** amount. Let's get those herbs to Valmiro.
dd1_examples.had he not: But she might have left him an heir, at least, ***had he not*** been so aloof.
dd1_examples.wisest: The man is clearly mad. 'Tis ***wisest*** to ignore the fool outright...
dd1_examples.did you not: Mm? ***Did you not*** hear from Quina, my child? She is gone to the abbey to the west.
dd1_examples.thrice: There is a saying among the Faith's historians that the dragon roars ***thrice***.
dd1_examples.beseech: I ***beseech*** you. Bring the Wakestones here.
dd1_examples.had not: Pray, forgive me, traveler. I ***had not*** known you till but recently.
dd1_examples.are you not: You are the one who slew the dragon, ***are you not***?
dd1_examples.will it not: Still, Gran Soren will be safe enough, ***will it not***? You'd hope so with all the guards about...
dd1_examples.commend: His Grace wishes to ***commend*** you for your valor and your service to the land.
dd1_examples.erelong: Word'a your deeds grows with each day. You're like to be the best-known face in these parts ***erelong***.
dd1_examples.swain: Believe in your fear! Keep it deep in your heart! Clutch it close to your breast like a ***swain***! Fear's all that is real in this world of pretend, despite what priests claim at the fane!
dd1_examples.wherefore: Only mortals know death! Only mortals know life! And alas, you can none of these be. Pray fly, fair Arisen, fly fast to your rift, ***wherefore*** emptiness might set you free.
dd1_examples.demesne: This castle is the ***demesne*** of the duke himself. You will comport yourself appropriately at all times.
dd1_examples.vanquish: Anyone with the power to ***vanquish*** the dragon is afforded every right and courtesy -- just as they should be.
dd1_examples.were you not: You were raised with Quina, ***were you not***?
dd1_examples.yea: ***Yea*** or nay, I care not, but speak up. I hate those that waste my time.
dd1_examples.behest: Hail, Arisen. Are you here at the duke's ***behest***?
dd1_examples.magnificent: ***Magnificent***, ser. The hold is ours once more.
dd1_examples.should they not: In truth, the Arisen is not bound to join the dragon in combat, ***should they not*** will it.
dd1_examples.wit: Ah, hello... As you can like tell from the look of me, I'm at my ***wit***'s end.
dd1_examples.asunder: I'll tear the whole of it ***asunder***!
dd1_examples.whither: ***Whither*** shall we go, my lord? The path ahead is treacherous and unknown.
dd1_examples.has it not: It has been some time since we last saw Lord Julien, ***has it not***?
dd1_examples.sunder: A strong shock would ***sunder*** this wall.
dd1_examples.wilt: Even the loveliest flowers ***wilt*** in time, master.
dd1_examples.raiment: The brave ought not need their ***raiment*** to speak for their mettle, no?
dd1_examples.does it not: The road here has a strange look to it, ***does it not***?
dd1_examples.somewhat: Are you hungry, Arisen? Such concerns are ***somewhat*** foreign to this pawn.
dd1_examples.where'er: Aye, 'tis a shame, but she's the sort to flourish ***where'er*** she goes.
dd1_examples.like to be: 'Tis ***like to be*** dangerous, I know, but I've faith in your abilities, ser.
dd1_examples.word'a: ***Word'a*** your deeds grows with each day. You're like to be the best-known face in these parts erelong.
dd1_examples.art: Stay and learn the ***art*** of war.
dd1_examples.abyssal: The creature emerged from the ***abyssal*** depths, its eyes glowing with ancient malice.
dd1_examples.acquisitor: The ***acquisitor*** gathers all manner of rare herbs and minerals for his potions.
dd1_examples.alluvial: The alluvial deposits along the riverbed contained traces of gold.
dd1_examples.ambrosial: The ***ambrosial*** scent of the flowers filled the air, sweet and intoxicating.
dd1_examples.anathema: The dragon is ***anathema*** to all living things, a curse upon this land.
dd1_examples.argence: The sword gleamed with ***argence*** light in the moon's pale glow.
dd1_examples.auspicious: The stars are ***auspicious*** tonight, favoring our endeavor.
dd1_examples.azure: Her eyes were ***azure*** as the summer sky, bright and unyielding.
dd1_examples.balmy: The ***balmy*** breeze carried the scent of blooming flowers from the garden.
dd1_examples.banshee: A ***banshee's*** wail echoed through the night, a harbinger of doom.
dd1_examples.befouled: The water had been ***befouled*** by the beast's corruption, unfit to drink.
dd1_examples.brawn: It requires both skill and ***brawn*** to wield such a heavy weapon.
dd1_examples.cerulean: The ***cerulean*** waters of the lake reflected the heavens above.
dd1_examples.chamberlain: The duke's ***chamberlain*** announced the arrival of the Arisen.
dd1_examples.cleric: The ***cleric*** offered prayers for the wounded, invoking the Maker's mercy.
dd1_examples.conqueror: You are a ***conqueror*** of dragons, Arisen, and legend follows in your wake.
dd1_examples.decoction: The alchemist prepared a potent ***decoction*** from the mandrake root.
dd1_examples.detoxicating: The ***detoxicating*** properties of the herb purified the blood of its poisons.
dd1_examples.distilled: The essence was ***distilled*** from rare flowers, concentrated and pure.
dd1_examples.draconian: The ***draconian*** beast soared overhead, its scales gleaming like obsidian.
dd1_examples.ebon: The ***ebon*** armor absorbed the light, rendering the wearer nearly invisible in shadow.
dd1_examples.font: What forgotten paradise? What ***font*** of endless diversion?!
dd1_examples.fulgurous: The ***fulgurous*** bolt struck true, lightning flashing across the battlefield.
dd1_examples.gargantuan: The ***gargantuan*** cyclops towered over us, its shadow darkening the valley.
dd1_examples.godly: Her power was ***godly*** in its magnitude, beyond mortal comprehension.
dd1_examples.hex: Witch, ***hexer*** -- name her as you will...
dd1_examples.indurated: The ***indurated*** scales of the dragon were like stone, impenetrable to steel.
dd1_examples.interventive: The ***interventive*** draught restored his strength, knitting his wounds.
dd1_examples.kindling: Gather ***kindling*** for the fire, for the night will be long and cold.
dd1_examples.lodestone: The ***lodestone*** attracted the iron filings with invisible force.
dd1_examples.lordly: He bore himself with ***lordly*** dignity, though he was but a common soldier.
dd1_examples.macabre: The scene was ***macabre***, a tableau of death and despair.
dd1_examples.magick: My first target will be those firing projectiles or utilizing ***magicks***.
dd1_examples.maker: The ***Maker*** created all things, and to the Maker all things return.
dd1_examples.maleficent: The ***maleficent*** spirit sought only to corrupt and destroy.
dd1_examples.mandrake: The ***mandrake*** root screamed when pulled from the earth, a deadly harvest.
dd1_examples.manse: The wizard's ***manse*** stood atop the hill, its towers reaching for the sky.
dd1_examples.martyr: He died a ***martyr*** to his cause, his sacrifice remembered by all.
dd1_examples.maul: The ogre wielded a massive ***maul***, crushing stone and bone alike.
dd1_examples.medicant: The traveling ***medicant*** offered healing to those in need, asking nothing in return.
dd1_examples.mitigator: The amulet served as a ***mitigator*** of pain, dulling the wounds of battle.
dd1_examples.mottled: The beast's ***mottled*** hide blended with the forest shadows, making it hard to track.
dd1_examples.nether: The souls of the damned were cast into the ***nether*** realms, forever lost.
dd1_examples.neutralizing: The ***neutralizing*** agent countered the poison, saving his life.
dd1_examples.nexus: The ancient temple was a ***nexus*** of power, where ley lines converged.
dd1_examples.panacea: The elixir was no ordinary cure—it was a ***panacea*** for all ailments.
dd1_examples.parcel: He carried a small ***parcel*** wrapped in cloth, its contents mysterious.
dd1_examples.petrifactor: The gorgon was a ***petrifactor***, turning all who beheld it to stone.
dd1_examples.phantom: The ***phantom*** drifted through walls, a ghost of what once was.
dd1_examples.pilgrim: The ***pilgrim*** walked the long road to the shrine, his faith guiding his steps.
dd1_examples.pioneer: He was a ***pioneer*** of these lands, the first to map the unknown territories.
dd1_examples.placative: The ***placative*** words soothed the angry beast, calming its rage.
dd1_examples.poxy: The ***poxy*** wounds festered, a sign of the plague that had taken the village.
dd1_examples.promissory: The ***promissory*** note pledged payment upon the dragon's defeat.
dd1_examples.putrid: The ***putrid*** stench of death filled the cavern, unbearable and thick.
dd1_examples.quill: The scribe dipped his ***quill*** in ink, ready to record the tale.
dd1_examples.rancid: The ***rancid*** meat had spoiled, unfit for consumption.
dd1_examples.rousing: His speech was ***rousing***, stirring the hearts of all who heard it.
dd1_examples.ruinous: The ***ruinous*** spell laid waste to the enemy ranks, leaving nothing but ash.
dd1_examples.salubrious: The ***salubrious*** mountain air restored our spirits after the long journey.
dd1_examples.scarlet: Her ***scarlet*** cloak flowed behind her like blood upon the battlefield.
dd1_examples.scathe: The dragon's fire did ***scathe*** the land, leaving scars that would never heal.
dd1_examples.sconce: The candle ***sconce*** cast flickering shadows upon the stone walls.
dd1_examples.scriptures: The holy ***scriptures*** spoke of the Arisen who would save the world.
dd1_examples.shamanic: The ***shamanic*** rituals called upon the spirits of the earth for guidance.
dd1_examples.shroud: A ***shroud*** of mystery covered the ancient artifact, its purpose unknown.
dd1_examples.sinister: The ***sinister*** figure watched from the shadows, its intentions dark.
dd1_examples.slick: The path was ***slick*** with rain, treacherous and unforgiving.
dd1_examples.smother: The flames threatened to ***smother*** us, consuming the air we breathed.
dd1_examples.sobering: The defeat was a ***sobering*** reminder of the dragon's power.
dd1_examples.soiled: His honor was ***soiled*** by betrayal, stained beyond redemption.
dd1_examples.spurious: The ***spurious*** relic was a fake, worthless despite its convincing appearance.
dd1_examples.stagnant: The ***stagnant*** water bred disease, a breeding ground for pestilence.
dd1_examples.sullied: Her reputation was ***sullied*** by false accusations, unjustly tarnished.
dd1_examples.supple: The leather was ***supple*** yet strong, perfect for armor that needed to move.
dd1_examples.tainted: The water was ***tainted*** with dark magic, deadly to those who drank it.
dd1_examples.tuft: A ***tuft*** of white hair marked him as one touched by destiny.
dd1_examples.vengeful: The ***vengeful*** spirit sought retribution for the wrongs done to it in life.
dd1_examples.vivifying: The ***vivifying*** energy of the spring restored life to the withered plants.
dd1_examples.virid: The ***virid*** moss glowed softly in the cavern, the only light in the darkness.
dd1_examples.void: The dragon emerged from the ***void***, a creature of nothingness and despair.
dd1_examples.wailing: The ***wailing*** of the grieving filled the streets, a chorus of sorrow.
dd1_examples.wake: The hero's ***wake*** drew mourners from across the land, all paying their respects.
dd1_examples.warlock: The ***warlock*** commanded dark forces, his power feared by all.
dd1_examples.wintry: The ***wintry*** wind cut through our cloaks, biting and cold.
dd1_examples.wormwood: The bitter taste of ***wormwood*** lingered, a reminder of the poison's potency.
dd1_examples.wench: We were told to stop her, but the ***wench*** won past us...
dd1_examples.fleet: He's fearsome ***fleet*** of foot, dashing about the village.
dd1_examples.wright: Might be it's not my place to say, being just a ship***wright***...

_comment2: Examples sourced from non-DD1 sources (API, manual curation, etc.)

other_examples.eventide: The mist rises from the lake at ***eventide***.
other_examples.'tis: ***'Tis*** true, then learn how false fears be.
other_examples.methinks: ***Methinks*** the lady doth protest too much, and her words betray her true intent.
other_examples.prithee: ***Prithee***, good sir, grant me a moment of your time to explain my situation.
other_examples.forsooth: ***Forsooth***, I swear upon my honor that I speak nothing but the truth this day.
other_examples.yonder: We could see people gathering down ***yonder*** by the riverbank.
other_examples.haply: ***Haply*** I think on thee, and then my state, Like to the lark at break of day arising From sullen earth, sings hymns at heaven's gate.
other_examples.hither: Come ***hither***, child, and let me see what manner of creature has wounded you so.
other_examples.betide: Woe ***betide*** any who dare challenge the might of the dragon in its own lair!
other_examples.betimes: Wedding him ***betimes*** to a lady who was as pious as she was beautiful.
other_examples.corse: Behold the ***corse*** of the fallen knight.
other_examples.verily: ***Verily***, I say unto you, the path of righteousness is narrow but leads to eternal salvation.
other_examples.troth: I give you my ***troth*** that I shall keep this promise.
other_examples.quaff: Let us ***quaff*** this ale in celebration.
other_examples.afeard: Be not ***afeard***, for there is nothing to fear.
other_examples.thence: He went to the village and ***thence*** returned home.
other_examples.affright: Do not let anything ***affright*** you in the dark.
other_examples.evenfall: The thrush sang it at the ***evenfall*** to the listening swan on the blue lake.
other_examples.forfend: Heaven ***forfend*** that we report such ill tidings, for the news would bring great sorrow to all.
other_examples.wain: A ***wain*** loaded high with hay and laughing children was crossing the field.
other_examples.whereon: As the deathbed ***whereon*** it must expire.
other_examples.sup: We shall ***sup*** together before the journey.
other_examples.e'en: Even the strongest warrior may fall ***e'en*** to a single blow.
other_examples.recreant: He would rather die than be ***recreant*** to his duty.
other_examples.wend: They ***wended*** their way through the forest.
other_examples.bethink: I must ***bethink*** myself of a solution, for time grows short and our enemies approach.
other_examples.sooth: In ***sooth***, I tell you truly, the omens have been dark and my heart is heavy with foreboding.
other_examples.tithe: The villagers paid their ***tithe*** to the temple each season.
other_examples.enow: If we are mark'd to die, we are ***enow*** to do our country loss.
other_examples.loathly: The beast had a ***loathly*** appearance that frightened the children.
other_examples.periapt: She wore a protective ***periapt*** around her neck.
other_examples.whereby: This is the method ***whereby*** we shall achieve our goal.
other_examples.verity: I speak the truth with ***verity*** when I say this is the truth.
other_examples.belike: It is ***belike*** that the storm will pass soon.
other_examples.ifsoe'er: ***Ifsoe'er*** you need assistance, call upon me.
other_examples.apart: They stood ***apart*** from the others, their faces grim and their hands upon their weapons.
other_examples.awesome: The sight was truly ***awesome*** to behold.
other_examples.with all speed: Proceed with ***all speed*** to the castle.
other_examples.tither: Go ***tither*** and see what lies beyond.
other_examples.wit not: I ***wit not*** what you speak of, for my mind is clouded with confusion and doubt.
other_examples.witting: He was ***witting*** of the danger ahead, yet chose to press onward regardless of the peril.
other_examples.bespeak: His words ***bespeak*** a noble heart and a spirit of generosity that knows no bounds.
other_examples.mazed: The traveler was ***mazed*** by the strange sights, unable to comprehend the wonders before his eyes.
other_examples.soil: The blood did ***soil*** his honor, staining his reputation forever.
other_examples.in short: ***In short***, we must depart before dawn breaks, lest our enemies discover our presence.
